chapters.title: Chapter 1261 - I Am Going To See My Son
chapters.body:
Chapter 1261 - I Am Going To See My Son

Chapter 1261: I Am Going to See My Son

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

“Sh*t!” Xu Que was embarrassed when he saw the empty mountain. I did not expect they would abandon me. Buttface and Duan Jiude are really abominable! How dare they do that to me? It seems I can’t give them anything in the future. Otherwise, they will take advantage of me again!

Xu Que shook his head. He had given so many Divine Escape Spells to Buttface. He really didn’t think Buttface would use those spells to leave him behind. It seemed Buttface and Duan Jiude had found something extraordinary. So, they had left in a hurry and wanted to obtain it without Xu Que. They also took Mo Junchen with them, which meant that the place they were about to go to could be dangerous. Mo Junchen could act as their guard.

Xu Que didn’t want to make a big deal over this issue with Buttface and Duan Jiude. He had found enough fortunes and opportunities. Also, Duan Jiude’s cultivation stage was too low. Even if he reached the Earth Celestial Stage, he was still not powerful enough. So Xu Que hoped he could enhance his strength with the things he had found. Although the actions of Buttface and Duan Jiude were very unethical, it was totally okay with Xu Que. After all, Buttface and Duan Jiude were good at entrapping others. But usually they were always outsmarted by Xu Que at the last. Xu Que had just arrived in the Heaven Continent, and he knew almost nothing about this place. This was the reason Buttface and Duan Jiude could fool him this time.

Humph! I’ll punish you severely when I see you again! Xu Que snorted and was about to leave. The next moment, Xu Que stopped and frowned.

“No!” Xu Que murmured in a low voice. He had just realized that Buttface and Duan Jiude didn’t need to leave in such a hurry if they were about to obtain something precious. They would have left sneakily, instead of in such a fair and square way. Also, before leaving here, they kept urging Xu Que to go to the Jade Lake, which was so suspicious!

“It turns out they really have something they are conspiring about! Or else, the Jade Lake is a dangerous place where the two of them don’t dare to go or even come close to. Maybe they did something bad there and escaped to avoid being punished by the Jade Lake. Now, they were trying to lure me there, so that I can fix their problem!” Xu Que touched his jaw thoughtfully. According to the style of Duan Jiude and Buttface, they would do that without hesitation, for this seemed totally acceptable for them.

“Tsk, tsk, tsk, it seems as if they really need some punishment! How dare they treat me like a fool! But…I will still go to the Jade Lake and check out what they have done. I will also try to find something precious there!” Xu Que ended his ruminations with a smile.

Whoosh!

The next moment, a wooden puppet, which was covered with thickly dotted runes, appeared in his hand. It was a Celestial Grade Disguise Puppet.

…..

Several days later, in Tianxiang City, which was at the center of the Tianxiang Celestial Realm, a weak, white-haired old man with a kind face stood outside the city. With a cane in his hand, the simply dressed old man seemed out of breath. He was gazing at the enormous city, which was floating in the sky, with amazement.

He had been truly shocked by this city. He hadn’t expected Tianxiang City to be floating just like a palace in heaven. The ancient city was surrounded by several moats. The water in these moats flowed down like waterfalls into the sea on the ground. Countless people were flying rapidly in the sky, stepping on flying swords and placing their hands behind their backs. The old man was standing on the seaside. The city was floating above his head. His emaciated figure seemed quite desolate on the beach. He appeared quite lonely and frustrated. However, expectations and dreams could be seen in his eyes. He held the cane tightly in his hand, for he feared he might be blown down by a gust of wind.

“Old man, are you heading for Tianxiang City?” At this time, a strand of light landed on the ground. The man in the light asked the old man his particulars. This man was a guard of the city. The old man had been spotted by the guards when he appeared outside the city. Everyone who came close to Tianxiang City had to be inspected. Normally, cultivators would stop in the sky. Then they would enter the city after the inspection was finished. People who came here on foot like the old man were quite rare indeed.

At this moment, the soldier was looking at the old man with a strand of concern in his eyes. The old man was at the Half Celestial Stage. It seemed as if he was suffering from a serious illness. So his strength was weaker than the ordinary cultivators at the Half Celestial Stage. He even had many lifeless Qi in his body. It seemed as if he would die soon. However, his kind face and sad eyes evoked sympathy from the soldier, and even reminded him of his deceased father.

Cough, cough, cough… At this time, a gust of wind blew up. The old man coughed painfully, and he covered his mouth.

“Old man, are you okay?” The young soldier asked. The old man waved his hand and smiled, “I’m okay. Thank you for your attention, my young friend. I am about to die soon. I have an incurable disease, but I have gotten used to it!”

“Eh, old man…what brings you to Tianxiang City? Is there anything I can do for you?” The soldier asked. Even though he was a guard of Tianxiang City at the Human Celestial Stage, he still addressed the old man reverently. He felt sorry for this old man and couldn’t help but treat this old man like his senior.

“I…cough, cough, I am here to see my son. I’ve heard that he is engaged to a girl in the Jade Lake. So, I guessed he might be in Tianxiang City. Alas! He left home long ago. I…I just want to reunite with him and his wife. And I will be satisfied if we can have dinner together before I leave this world!” The old man spoke slowly, as if it was taking all his energy.

Hearing that, the soldier’s eyes welled up with tears. His father also had had such a wish before his death. It was a pity that he had kept searching for fortunes and opportunities in the outside world and focused solely on his cultivation. When he finally went back to his dusty, shabby home, his father had been dead for many years. Now, when he heard the words of the old man, he missed his father even more and he felt guilty.

“It’s okay. Old man, please inject your Celestial Core Power into this entry plate. Then, you can enter the city as long as you are not a criminal wanted by the law!” The soldier took out an entry plate. Although he was moved by the old man, the formalities couldn’t be omitted. After finishing the inspection, the soldier took the old man into Tianxiang City and escorted him to the Jade Lake personally.

Tianxiang City was a big city, which had at least dozens of sects. The soldier worried that the old man would be bullied by some outlaws. So he decided to escort the old man to his destination personally. From the city gate, they needed to fly for one day to reach the nearest Teleportation Device, through which they could reach the Jade Lake. Thanks to the escort of the warm-hearted soldier, nobody dared to provoke the old man. Three days later, they arrived at the Jade Lake.

“Old man, what is the name of your son? Also, what is the name of the Jade Lake’s female apprentice who is engaged to your son? Tell me their names, and I will inform the guards of the Jade Lake!” Standing outside the Jade Lake, the soldier asked as he looked at the old man with concern.

The old man looked up proudly. Then he said with a sigh, “My son…was handsome when he was still a child. So he has two nicknames, which are Xu Handsome and Xu Pretty! His full name is Xu Que. I have heard that he is engaged to the Jade Lake’s Holy Virgin, Bai Cailing. So, I came here from afar and want to see him and his fiancee!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1262 - I Am Xu Que’S Father!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1262 - I Am Xu Que’S Father!

Chapter 1262: I Am Xu Que’s Father!

“Wh…what? Old man, you mean to say…Xu Que…Xu Que is your son, right? And Bai Cailing, the Jade Lake’s Holy Virgin, is your daughter-in-law?” Hearing that, the soldier was totally dumbfounded.

The Jade Lake was the most powerful sect in the Tianxiang Celestial Realm. Normally, he wouldn’t dare to approach this place as an ordinary soldier. If he hadn’t shown sympathy for this old man, he would never have come to the Jade Lake. Now, the soldier was stunned by the absurd words of the old man who said Bai Cailing, the Holy Virgin of the Jade Lake, was his daughter-in-law. My God! Luckily, I didn’t take him into the Jade Lake. Otherwise, I would have been killed here today!

“Right! I am Xu Que’s father! What has happened? Did he do something wrong?” The old man asked as he looked at the soldier with a worried expression on his face.

The soldier replied with a wry smile, “Old man, I guess you have been fooled by someone! As far as I know, Xu Que is the leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction. Buttface and Duan Jiude, who are his underlings, robbed everything from a treasure house of the Jade Lake. Now, the Jade Lake is trying to capture Buttface, Duan Jiude, and even Xu Que!”

“What? What an…unfilial son! I didn’t expect that he could do such a shameless thing…” The old man was so angry that his face got red and the blue veins could be seen standing out on his hands.

“I…cough, cough, cough…” The next moment, when the old man tried to say something, he spat blood because of the anger in his heart. It seemed as if he was on his last gasp.

The soldier was shocked by this scene. He injected some Vital Force into the old man’s body and patted the old man’s back. Then he consoled him, “Old man, you are very frail! Please calm down! Let me find a hostel, so that you can have a rest in it. Please don’t mention Xu Que to any others. Also, it is impossible for Xu Que to be engaged to Bai Cailing. She is the Holy Virgin of Jade Lake and is extremely exalted. How could she… Eh, old man, I believe you can understand me!”

“Yes, yes!” The old man nodded his head and his eyes were full of tears. Then, he said in a sad voice, “My young friend, you are a good man! What is your name?”

“My name is Zhang Mingjun. Let me take you to the hostel now!” The soldier replied with a smile. Then he was about to leave, supporting the old man. However, the old man just stood there and didn’t want to move. He waved his hand, “My young friend, thank you! But…since my unfilial son has done something wrong, I can’t ignore that as his father. Please go and leave me here. I will make an apology to the Jade Lake personally!”

“Ah? Eh…” Zhang Mingjun was totally shocked when he heard that. Then he said hurriedly, “Old man, please don’t do that! If the Jade Lake knows you are Xu Que’s father, they will definitely…”

“Young man, is our Jade Lake so insolent and unreasonable for you?” Before Zhang Mingjun had finished speaking, a gust of a powerful aura gushed out from the Jade Lake as a majestic voice rang out. According to the voice, the lady should be quite old. And her cultivation stage could also be told from her voice. This lady must at least have reached the Golden Celestial Stage.

“Senior…please forgive me! It was a slip of the tongue!” Zhang Mingjun dropped on his knees and said nervously. As a soldier of Tianxiang City, he was rude to say that outside the gate of the Jade Lake.

“Okay! I’ve heard your conversation. I will forgive you for your good intentions. You can leave now. The old man can come into the Jade Lake now!” The lady’s voice continued at this time. Hearing that, Zhang Mingjun let out a sigh of relief. He stood up and looked at the old man worriedly. Then he clenched his teeth and said, folding his hands at the Jade Lake, “Senior, please forgive my rudeness. Although this old man is Xu Que’s father, he has no idea about what Xu Que has done before. Would you please…”

“Mind your words!” A scolding could be heard from the Jade Lake immediately, “I’ve said it before! Is the Jade Lake so overbearing for you? Humph! What a reckless young man. Although your cultivation stage is very low, you have still tried to protect this old man! I hereby guarantee that we will never hurt this old man. You can leave now! If you dare to say anything stupid again, you will be severely punished!”

“Thank you, senior! I was too rude just now!” Zhang Mingjun said as he folded his hands hurriedly. Now, he could put his heart at rest. Since the big shot of the Jade Lake said so, the old man would never be hurt! He said as he looked at the old man with a smile, “Old man, I will leave now. Please take care of yourself!”

“Okay, my young friend, thank you! You are really a good guy!” The old man said as he patted Zhang Mingjun’s hands with a kind smile as if a senior was praising a young man.

“I am flattered!” Zhang Mingjun smiled and scratched his head. After saying good-bye to the old man, he turned around and left. At this time, the old man turned to the Jade Lake. The gate had been opened. Several young apprentices, who were in pink robes, were standing outside the gate and looking at him.

“Alas!” The old man shook his head slightly as he sighed. Then he started to walk towards the gate with difficulty. Although his movement was quite difficult, he still managed to dash to the gate with several steps. It was just a simple moving art. The female apprentices of the Jade Lake at the gate were not surprised. On the contrary, the old man was too slow for them. However, they didn’t show any impatience. The old man’s kind face had aroused pity from them just asit had for Zhang Mingjun just now.

“Old man, this way, please! The Holy Virgin and Deacon Lin are waiting for you in the meeting room!” A female apprentice said with a smile as she led the way for the old man. As the lady had said before, the Jade Lake was not an unreasonable or overbearing sect. Even though the old man said he was Xu Que’s father, they didn’t vent their anger on him. Moreover, the old man said he would make an apology for what Xu Que did. What a great devotion from a father!

Soon, the female apprentice led the old man into the Jade Lake. They passed by many big lakes with clear water and a lot of lotus flowers, which were giving off refreshing Celestial Core Power and fragrance. At the center of those lakes, a small path paved with colorful stones led to the depths of the Jade Lake. On their way, the old man felt the Vital Force in his body was growing slowly, which made him more energetic and comfortable! He looked around in surprise as he walked forward following a female apprentice.

Soon, they came into a big yard. A big Array was set up in the center of this yard. At the center of this big Array, there was a large colorful stone. To the old man’s surprise, the female apprentice activated the Array with a magic art. Then, a strand of blue light appeared on the large colorful stone, which dragged the old man into the Array. After the feeling of being pulled, the old man found the illusory realm in front of him was changed. He had been teleported into a spacious, bright meeting room.

The meeting room was full of people. The seat for the Holy Mother in the middle was empty. Beside it, dozens of young and old women were sitting in different rows on both sides. They were led by a beautiful young woman in a white robe who was quite elegant. A middle-aged woman was sitting opposite to her. According to the aura of the middle-aged woman, she should be the one who spoke for them.

The women fixed their eyes on the old man when he appeared in this room. Then the beautiful young woman in the white robe stood up and asked as she looked at the old man, “Old man, you said you are Xu Que’s father, right?”

“Right! I am Xu Que’s father!” The old man, who held a cane in his hand, said as he nodded his head. Then he sighed, “Alas! I didn’t expect my unfilial son would do that! I hereby make an apology to all of you!” As he said this, the old man bent over and was about to drop on his knees in a tottering manner.

“Wait!” The young woman in the white robe stopped the old man and said, “Old man, please don’t worry. I am Bai Cailing, the Holy Virgin of Jade Lake. A dozen years ago, I met your son Xu Que several times. He saved my life. So we won’t blame him for what he did. Don’t worry! But…just now you said Xu Que was engaged to me, which is not true. Who told you that?”

“Ah! You are my daughter-in-law… Ahem, sorry for my abruptness! Ms. Bai, ladies, actually, I haven’t finished my words just now. The marriage contract between my son and Ms. Bai could be proven by a marriage certificate!” Then the old man waved his hand and took out a piece of golden paper from his crotch. There were several lines of words and Bai Cailing’s signature on the paper. Also, Bai Cailing’s aura could be sensed on the paper.

Swish!

Instantly, the room was in a dead silence, for everyone was shocked. Bai Cailing opened her eyes wide as she stared at the paper. Apparently, she remembered that receipt for a loan. However, she couldn’t figure out why the receipt for a loan had been changed to a marriage certificate!

Chapter 1327 - It Isn’T Like We Don’T Have A Solution

Chapter 1327: It Isn’t Like We Don’t Have a Solution

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

“Huh?” Li Qinghe and everyone else present were astounded. Even Li Xuanqi wore a startled look as he thought, “Would this descendant of the ancestors make trouble once again out of nothing?”

HUMPH! Xu Que snorted coldly and denounced the crowd sternly, “Even though I’m already a Deputy Dean, I still hope that you won’t give my son, Xu Que, any special treatment. I won’t approve of any extravagant and wasteful welcoming ceremony. We should despise such actions.

“Since we have built an academy, we must focus on educating people and setting them on the right path. We mustn’t provide anyone special treatment, and we must walk with the crowd… No, that isn’t right, we must walk along with students and live harmoniously with them. We must keep fair and just education ideals. We mustn’t divide students into several grades. Don’t you realize that a good education program takes a long time to develop?”

In an instant, the whole location descended into silence. Everyone here was confused by Xu Que’s long sermon.

Even though the people here were all experienced men who had cultivated for innumerable years, they were still bewildered by Xu Que’s ceaseless speeches, and they all felt that Xu Que must be a great teacher.

“Li Xuanqi, you were previously a disciple of the Heaven Palace Sect, so you know the Heaven Palace’s Inner Sanctum rules, don’t you?” At this moment, Xu Que swept Li Xuanqi with his gaze.

Li Xuanqi was startled and he thought, “What the h*ll, I was previously only an Outer Sanctum disciple.”

“That is right, it’s right! Brother Xu isn’t mistaken. So did you all hear him clearly?” Li Xuanqi spoke to Li Qinghe and the other people.

“I understood it thoroughly,” Li Qinghe replied helplessly.

As the crowd started pondering over what Xu Que had said, they discovered that his teachings were really reasonable.

Most of the resources of the current Heaven Palace Academy were used on their own people, while the rest of the disciples had to depend upon the factions supporting them and cultivate with their own resources. This was why what he said made sense. The cultivation of some poor disciples who lacked resources was slow due to this, and their peerless talents were wasted.

If the previous Heaven Palace Sect had really operated according to the Sanctum Rules mentioned by Elder Xu, then it wasn’t surprising that it developed well and became powerful. This could have been one of the factors behind its great power.

The crowd understood everything, and they nodded, while respect welled up in their hearts. Since Elder Xu had such a side to him, they could set their minds at ease. After all, he had done everything just for the Heaven Palace Academy’s interests, while he even set an example with himself, and forbade the academy from providing his son any special treatment. Just such a matter alone was quite persuasive!

“Elder Xu, you can be at ease, we have understood what you are saying,” in the end, Li Qinghe spoke with a smile.

“Okay, it’s fine as long as you understand it.” Xu Que nodded with satisfaction, before he continued, “However, I also understand your kind respect for my son. So when he arrives, even though you don’t have to make any extravagant and wasteful welcoming ceremony, you can still give him some Celestial Artifacts or Immortal Elixirs. I won’t oppose such a matter, and I will also bear your gifts in mind, and, when the time comes, I will announce your gifts in front of everyone in the academy to express my thanks to you.”

“Huh?” The crowd immediately opened their eyes wide.

“Sending gifts?”

“You have asked to not make any welcoming ceremony, yet you still want to take gifts?”

“What? I have to warn you that you mustn’t offer him precious gifts. It’s fine to just give some little gifts. It isn’t the gift that counts, but the thought behind it. You probably can understand such an argument, can’t you?” Xu Que looked so innocent and spoke righteously.

At this moment, the crowd heaved a sigh of relief. It turned out that they just had to send some small gifts as a formality. If it was just this, it was still fine.

SIGH! “However, I’m still worried that you will make a mistake and send some precious gifts. If you do so, I will be troubled. However, you should still trust me, as even if you don’t offer any precious gifts, I won’t make trouble for you later in the academy, and I won’t put poison in your elixir bottles, while I also won’t throw hidden weapons at you while you cultivate. Will I do so? I won’t do it. It’s impossible. You can set your minds at ease, as I’m surely not that kind of person.”

Xu Que started giving the crowd suggestions and hints crazily.

Cold sweat started seeping out of the people’s bodies, while they all looked at Li Xuanqi with an aggrieved look, thinking, “Ancestor, are you sure that you want to place such a person in the Heaven Palace Academy and let him become the Deputy Dean?”

At this time, Li Xuanqi had a headache, and he suddenly started regretting his actions. He started wondering whether his choice had been a mistake. However, when Li Xuanqi looked at the two ancestors’ souls standing behind Xu Que, his hesitation disappeared completely.

Those two powerful souls were the reason why he had to ignore what Xu Que had done previously and why he had to tolerate Xu Que repeatedly while in front of his descendants. If those two souls didn’t exist, Li Xuanqi wouldn’t have wasted his breath on Xu Que, and he would have slapped him to death long ago.

Moreover, Xu Que still hadn’t made any outrageous demands, and he just seemed unreliable and rascally. But even if that had been the case, it didn’t matter, as what they needed to worry about wasn’t Xu Que, but the two ancestors’ souls.

….

In the end, Xu Que took Buttface, Duan Jiude, and the rest of his group with him and left in front of the crowd’s aggrieved gazes. He walked out of the tomb room with swagger and proceeded toward the exit.

Since Xu Que had already become the Heaven Palace Academy’s Deputy Dean, he didn’t have any more to worry about, and he calmly left through the ancestral tomb’s main entrance. He wanted to go visit Jiang Hongyan on the way.

Li Qinghe had given Xu Que the Deputy Dean’s badge personally, and it would help Xu Que make his way through the Heaven Palace Academy. The people of this world would get to find out that the Heaven Palace Academy had gotten another Deputy Dean only after the end of the ancestral sacrifices’ ceremony.

Xu Que felt as if he had gotten a change of fortune and even that he could become this land’s master, and he was thinking wild thoughts, “Since he was followed by two awesome souls, who would dare to provoke him?”

However, just as the group took a step out of the ancestral tomb, a fog started rising from the two souls, and they started disappearing at a high speed.

“F*ck! Kiddo, quickly go back,” Buttface cried out in alarm and dragged Xu Que back into the ancestral tomb.

As for the two souls, they followed Xu Que inside blankly, and, after they had done so, they recovered to their normal forms.

Xu Que frowned and tried to stay calm.

He could obviously understand the current situation, as it was similar to Li Xuanqi’s situation. Those two souls weren’t able to leave the ancestral tomb.

In a certain sense, it could be said that the two souls and Li Xuanqi were beings who weren’t tolerated by the Heaven Way. They had already exhausted their life spans, and they were supposed to die. However, they had violated the Heaven Way’s rules and still survived until today. The ancestral tomb possessed a concealment function, and it covered them from most of the Heaven Way’s rules. Those souls remained in good condition only due to this.

However, once they left the ancestral tomb, the Heaven Way’s rules would descend upon them, and everything that should return to dust would return to dust. Everything that shouldn’t be left behind would dissipate along with the wind.

“F*ck! We have made so many plans. So who could have imagined that they unexpectedly couldn’t come out! What should we do?” Buttface spoke angrily.

Buttface coveted such powerful bodyguards greatly, but now that he couldn’t take them out, how could he still do whatever he wanted?

“As a matter of fact, I think that leaving them here isn’t so bad for us. After all, Li Xuanqi is also here, and he can be considered a hostage in our hands. The Heaven Palace Academy’s members surely wouldn’t dare to mess with us,” Duan Jiude stroked his chin and spoke.

Xu Que chuckled bitterly and shook his head. “You hope that they can stay here, but it’s up to them to stay here.”

Duan Jiude was right, if they didn’t have a better choice, leaving the two souls in the ancestral tomb wasn’t bad for them.

But the issue was that the two souls treated Xu Que as their child, and they followed him everywhere. When Xu Que took a step out of the ancestral tomb, the two souls started disappearing, but they didn’t care about that and stood blankly next to Xu Que.

It was impossible for Xu Que to leave the souls here unless he also stayed here or replaced himself with Xuanyuan Wanrong’s remnant soul and let her also stay here.

Neither option was feasible. Xu Que couldn’t stay here, while he also wasn’t able to take out Xuanyuan Wanrong’s remnant soul. After all, the remnant soul had fallen asleep, and it would only awaken after the arrival of her main body.

“Lad, why don’t you stay here? I will go out, and do whatever I want in your stead,” Buttface looked at Xu Que, winked at him, and spoke.

“Get lost!” Xu Que gave a brief reply.

“As a matter of fact…” At this moment, Liu Jingning, who had stood next to them wearing a pensive look, spoke suddenly, “It isn’t like we don’t have a way to leave safely without taking them with us.”

Chapter 1368 - Demon! Ah, Demon!

Chapter 1368: Demon! Ah, Demon!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Did the Heavenly Tribulation run away?

That’s what everyone thought!

Even though Duan Jiude and Liu Jingning had once seen Xu Que crossing a tribulation, it was only at the last phase that the Heavenly Tribulation started retreating. It had never run away by itself when only half-descended.

This was a never-before-seen happening and a shocking sight.

“My dear, when did this lad become so devilish? Even the Heavenly Tribulation is afraid of him,” Duan Jiude asked, as he was filled with shock. He found this unbelievable.

Liu Jingning also looked startled, but later she smiled beautifully.

“The man I fancy should be like this.”

…..

“F*ck! Do you want to escape? I have waited for you for a long time, yet you want to escape? Come back to me!”

At this moment, Xu Que shouted loudly and stamped the ground with both legs. He instantly turned into a light beam that rushed into the sky.

In the twinkling of an eye, he overtook the golden lightning bolt, and, as he waved his hand, his tremendous Celestial Core Power formed a giant hand that seemed like a God’s hand. The hand forcefully took hold of the golden lightning bolt and pulled it!

BANG!

The next moment, Xu Que opened his mouth and a terrifying suction force emanated from him. He instantly absorbed the struggling golden lightning into his belly.

In an instant, his whole body became engulfed by golden lightning, and it emitted a golden radiance. Wisps of lightning were running across his skin’s surface, and his body seemed like a Golden Dharmic Body that could exterminate all other beings. He seemed so powerful!

The Divine Farmer Clan members were completely dumbstruck, and their minds went blank.

As for Yi Fang, his face turned pale, his pupils contracted, and his body shivered. He found this unbelievable!

“How…how is this possible?”

He couldn’t accept this. This was beyond his understanding of a Heavenly Tribulation.

Cultivators were afraid of the Heavenly Tribulation because it was a tribulation, it was a tribulation of Heaven that they suffered because they went against it. Everyone had been afraid of it throughout the ages.

But now, the Ancient Catastrophe that was considered the most terrifying Heavenly Tribulation had been scared by an old man. The most amazing thing was that this old man had still chased it and swallowed it.

“What is the meaning of this?”

“Is he toying with us?”

“We have striven so hard and our few Guardians have consumed a large part of their cultivation power and life span to summon an Ancient Catastrophe. Yet, this is the outcome.”

“What the h*ll is this? What kind of crazy plot is this?”

The Divine Farmer Clan members almost collapsed, and it was especially the case for the few Guardians. They couldn’t accept this reality, and they had even forgotten about trying to get away. They stood in a daze in their places and observed everything that occurred with blank faces.

This incident had occurred quickly, and it had lasted for only a few seconds. After Xu Que swallowed the first wisp of Ancient Catastrophe, his body quickly moved and charged toward the second wisp.

The golden lightning was hiding among the pitch-black lightning clouds and it was trying to disappear.

If the clouds didn’t scatter, the golden lightning wouldn’t be able to dissipate, and it could only hide among them. It was like a scared little snake and it didn’t possess even a tad of its former tyrannical aura and heavenly might.

“Come get me!”

Xu Que laughed in front of the dumbstruck crowd’s gazes as he looked for the second wisp of the Ancient Catastrophe in the clouds and dragged it away forcefully. Soon after, he stuffed it into his mouth.

This was a crude and simple way to swallow it, and it left a second trauma on the minds of the Divine Farmer Clan members.

A demon, this man was a demon and wasn’t a human.

How was it possible for an ordinary person or an ordinary cultivator to do this?

The Divine Farmer Clan members were shocked, and their knowledge, which was built upon innumerable years of cultivation, was nearly toppled.

BURP!!

At this moment, Xu Que let out a long burp in the sky. The noise wasn’t loud, but the Divine Farmer Clan members found it too ear-piercing, and they found it satirical.

However, Xu Que had only burped because his belly was too full. This was the first time he had tried swallowing the golden lightning to consume it.

As a matter of fact, this had distinctive effects. In the past, when he still had the Hell King’s Prison Suppression Physique, he tried using the golden lightning to hone his body. But now, he had already gotten a second-rate holy physique, and an Ancient Catastrophe at this grade couldn’t be used to hone his body.

This was why he had swallowed it, and this was better than using it externally to hone his body because the effects would be greater.

Even though it didn’t seem that his body’s surface received any immediate benefits, his meridians and internal organs power rose by another level after they were honed by the Ancient Catastrophe’s lightning essence.

A Holy Physique implied that the inside and outside of one’s body were both trained to the pinnacle, and one could depend upon his flesh body alone to become a saint. This was why it was called a Holy Physique!

“Interesting! When I get a first-rate Holy Physique in the future, nothing in the world will be able to obstruct me, and, if I want to go back to Earth, I just have to pierce the void with my fist and fly among the Spatial Wind’s blades.”

Xu Que had gotten some inspiration, and he became full of expectations for the Holy Physique.

The Holy Physique of the Act-Tough King had an aptitude and future beyond imagination, and it probably had another potential that he still hadn’t unearthed thoroughly.

“I need a fight. No, I don’t need just one fight, but a large number of fights. I need them to stimulate the Holy Physique’s boundless potential so that it can reach a new level. I must find a way to acquire a first-rate Holy Physique.”

Xu Que understood something. All kinds of physiques couldn’t reach their peak state by depending on a large amount of precious natural resources, and even if it was possible, one still wouldn’t be able to perfectly use that said physique’s full power.

During the recent past, he had been vigilant and fearful. After all, Taiyi Celestials and Daluo Celestials could kill him with a single finger.

This was why he wanted to develop himself through acting shamelessly, and he wanted to keep a low-profile as he tried to become stronger. This was why he used the identity of Xu Que’s father to cheat people in the Heaven Continent and why he used tricks to intimidate people.

It was especially the case when he got the protection of the two souls at the apex of the Celestial Prime Stage. Then he had desired to laze around more than before.

But now, after he had swallowed two golden lightning bolts, his flesh body got much stronger, and this was why Xu Que finally reflected over what he had been doing.

He mustn’t continue doing what he had been doing for a long time!

His road was filled with dangers, and a person who could pose a deadly threat to Xuanyuan Wanrong had even appeared. This was why he must become stronger quickly!

“Why I was so strong in the past?”

“Besides the System, the reason behind this was that I was fearless. Isn’t that so?”

“But now, why do I have to fear everything?”

“Even if I possess a backer and supporter, I still mustn’t depend upon him to make a living, and I must free myself of all restraints and struggle with my power fearlessly. In any case, I have support, so why do I have to worry about anything?”

“In the past, my supporter was the System. But now, the System’s version is out-dated, and it can’t provide me help for now. This was why my greatest supporter now is the two souls at the peak Celestial Prime Stage.”

“This is why I must now do something great.”

BANG!

The aura of Xu Que that was in the air suddenly became stronger and sharper than before, and his fearless, dominating air was revealed wholly.

This aura had always belonged to Xu Que, but after he disguised himself as Xu Que’s father, he had restrained it.

But now, he didn’t have to curb anything, and he didn’t plan to conceal anything.

“As a matter of fact, I have a secret, and I must inform you of it.”

Xu Que stood in the air and looked disdainfully at everyone. He stared at Yi Fang and his companions before he spoke with a smile.

Yi Fang and his companions were scared by Xu Que’s powerful aura that had appeared suddenly, and they didn’t pay any attention to what he said. Their first response was: “D*mn it!”

“It’s awful! Let’s retreat quickly,” Yi Fang shouted.

The few Guardians responded quickly, and they probably carried the talented youths and Yi Fang, before they rushed toward the entrance.

They didn’t care about the secret that Xu Que wanted to divulge, and the only thing they knew now was that if they didn’t escape, they would surely die here and they would suffer a miserable death.

But what was beyond their expectations was that after they had rushed out, they discovered that Xu Que hadn’t taken any actions and he was still floating in mid-air, looking at them with a smile.

Yi Fang and his companions realized that something was amiss, and they turned their heads around to take a look.

Mo Junchen was already waiting for them. He released the full power of Hell King’s Prison Suppression Physique. He emitted a tyrannical aura and he seemed able to defend a pass by himself in the face of 10,000 men. He blocked the way!

He slowly raised his hand and pointed his finger at Yi Fang’s group. He sneered and said, “I want to fight ten all by myself.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1377 - Don’T Even Think About It!
chapters.body:
Chapter 1377 - Don’T Even Think About It!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

“KAO! KAO!”

Buttface shouted derisively at Mo Junchen.

“Guardian Mo, you can’t do this! We’ve been practicing nonstop on the road. Our proud slogan…you’ve ruined it with your weak voice!”

“…..”

Mo Junchen was embarrassed beyond belief. If Xu Que hadn’t insisted, there was no way he would’ve shouted out the words anyway.

Reputation is the indicator of a powerful presence. Screaming slogans and shouting out words are not.

And yet…

The Assembly Hall was filled with silence.

Every person from the Sage Sect was looking extremely solemn. No one dared to speak. It was almost as if Mo Junchen’s slogan had succeeded in threatening them.

“With the Exploding Heavens Faction, what you will have is only extinction.

“The Exploding Heavens Faction will not only bring you dread, but also leave you with only a single needle and a piece of thread.”

This struck the people listening as confidence. Because who would shout words like these if they weren’t confident?

It was obvious. This confidence must have come from the old man!

Everyone’s gaze shifted toward Xu Que.

Mo Junchen read the atmosphere and was stunned.

“This wasn’t right!

“This moment…shouldn’t they be mocking us? Why were they all afraid?

Come on! How are we suddenly so fortunate this year? Does anyone really think our Exploding Heavens Faction is this awesome?”

“Elder Xu, what do you mean by this?” Sect Leader Xiao Tienhen finally spoke up.

His face looked sickly. Xu Que had clearly stated that he was here to pick a fight, which meant that he had it in for the Sage Sect. With such knowledge, how else could Xiao Tienhen look?

“What do I mean? Ho, ho…wasn’t I clear enough? I came to pick a fight!” Xu Que repeated this as he laughed coldly, as his hand swept out in front of him.

BOOM!

At the loud noise, the roof of the Sage Sect’s Assembly Hall ripped off and flew into the sky, crushed and useless.

Xu Que, carrying the monstrous Chiliad Gold Resurrection Vine, quickly walked farther into the Assembly Hall, taking giant steps and appearing inimitable.

His gaze fell directly on the people inside as he spoke in a low voice, “Sect Leader Xiao, the words you used before…righteous people don’t speak with hidden words. Do you all really claim to not know why I am here at the Sage Sect today?”

SMACK!

Xiao Tienhen hit both arms of his chair as he immediately stood up with his face glowering angrily, “Elder Xu, do not go too far!”

“Ehh, you are still very strong. Isn’t it your Sage Sect that has gone too far?” Xu Que’s smile was completely without humor. And, in the very next moment, his humorless smile had been erased by his fury as he roared, “How dare you covet my daughter-in-law? Are all the members of the Sage Sect tired of living?”

BOOM!

A thunderous noise tore through the Assembly Hall, like a giant cannon exploding in everyone’s ears. It was painful and made everyone nervous.

Even the likes of Xiao Tienhen, a Golden Celestial of the Great All-Embracing Heaven, was stunned by Xu Que’s thunderous sound. Xiao Tienhen’s glowering face quickly started looking less angry and more painful.

In truth, Xu Que had a perfectly good reason to be here.

Jiang Hongyan had told the Sage Sect that she and a person named Xu Que were cultivation companions, and, for this reason, she hadn’t accepted what the Sage Sect had offered.

However, the Sage Sect had relentlessly insisted, hoping that she would accept the advances of the Divine Being of Taoist Fetus to bring forth the Divine Being of Heavenly Kismet Taoist Fetus.

Hence, the trouble they found themselves in was entirely their own fault.

“Elder Xu, this is all a big misunderstanding. We didn’t know that Jiang Hongyan was your daughter-in-law. Moreover,our idea of the marriage was only a suggestion. It was never realized. Honestly, I need your advice. Our Holy Water River in the Snow Mountains, why was it moved away?” Xiao Tienhen skillfully steered the conversation away from the talk of marriage onto the matter of the river, trying to trap Xu Que.

Xiao Tienhen’s words were argumentative. If Xu Que was here to argue about the proposed matter of a marriage with Jiang Hongyan, then why couldn’t he find out why Xu Que had taken away their Holy Water River? They had both done things against each other.

However, Xu Que was enraged by Xiao Tienhen’s words and replied heatedly, “How can you even mention the Holy Water River to me? The river’s owner is Xuanyuan Wanrong, I believe that you all know this to be true. Xuanyuan Wanrong is my daughter-in-law. You have been benefiting greatly from using the river all these years. I expect to hear how you plan to make up for it!”

“? ? ?”

Xiao Tienhen was confounded by Xu Que’s response.

The Sage Sect elders within the hall were all equally bewildered.

“You took away our Holy Water River, and now you’re the one asking for compensation?

“The river’s owner is Xuanyuan Wanrong? Xuanyuan Wanrong is your daughter-in-law? What the h*ell are you talking about? You think you can say whatever you want!”

“Why bother talking? Let’s begin!” Buttface shouted, eager to fight.

Since there was so much of the Chiliad Gold Resurrection Vines on hand, the two spirits needed to take advantage of it now. When would be a better time?

“Right! What’s the point in talking? Let the fight begin, we can talk after!” Duan Jiude nodded his head, in complete agreement with Buttface.

Xu Que’s eyes narrowed, coldly laughing as he stared at Xiao Tienhen.

At the moment, there was nothing that could intimidate Xu Que. No matter what the Sage Sect had up their sleeves, Xu Que could defeat them at once by letting the two spirits out.

“Wait!”

Suddenly, Elder Lee walked up with a broad smile and approached Xu Que, “Elder Xu, fortune comes out of harmony! The Sage Sect is indeed in the wrong, but we are all people of the Tao, we don’t need to fight when there is a simple disagreement. Let’s all sit and have a cup of tea. The Sage Sect will provide a satisfactory answer.”

After these words, Elder Lee gazed respectfully at Xiao Tienhen and continued, “Sect Leader, may I take you aside? There is something that I’d like to discuss with you.”

Xiao Tienhen frowned in response, nodded his head, and walked directly away from the Assembly Hall.

Elder Lee silently motioned for the others to wait.

A moment later, Xiao Tienhen and Elder Lee walked out to the mountainside behind the Sage Sect.

“Elder Lee, you’ve asked me to step away. Were you thinking of having me open the door?” Xiao Tienhen expressed himself directly, not bothering to wait for Elder Lee to speak.

Elder Lee responded reverentially, “That’s correct, Sect Leader. I think we’ve arrived at the point where we should open the door to awake our ancestors. The times have changed, only with the ancestors’ arrival can we control Xu Que.”

Xiao Tienhen, nodding his head slightly, was deep in thought for a while before replying, “I didn’t plan on taking this move so quickly. But you’re right, the times have changed. I had almost forgotten about the door. It’s been a very long time since anyone has dared speak to me so boldly.”

As he spoke, a murderous expression came onto Xiao Tienhen’s face. Softly, he said, “Go back to settle with them. I will go to the sacred grounds!”

“Aye!” Elder Lee happily responded.

Within the Sage Sect’s sacred grounds was a door that he’d always wished to open.

When this particular door was opened, the entire Heaven Continent would enter a new era. All the power would be freshly redistributed, but he had confidence in the Sage Sect’s ability to maintain their position within the Heaven Continent. As for the Heaven Palace Academy…there were no guarantees. However, that could also mean extra resources for the Sage Sect in the future!

With the door’s opening, the most significant point was obviously the numerous ancestors of the Lee Family. The Ming Family didn’t have the same reinforcements!

So when the time came, he wouldn’t have to worry about the Ming Family rising in power through the union of the Divine Being of Taoist Fetus and the Divine Being of Heavenly Kismet.

With his spirits lifting excitedly, Elder Lee returned to the Assembly Hall.

At the same moment, Xu Que and Duan Jiude were being waited on as they sat in the hall. They were acting exceedingly arrogant, as if this were their own home.

Buttface took things even farther, squatting to defecate in the center of the Assembly Hall. Without bothering to clean himself up, he sat directly onto the Sect Leader’s chair! He sat there pompously, propping one ankle over a knee.

The Sage Sect elders looked on with disgusted faces while standing silently.

Elder Lee walked in, full of smiles, ready to appease the visitors.

“Elder Xu, I’m sorry to have made you wait. Sect Leader has gone to prepare things. He will definitely provide you with a satisfactory solution,” he spoke warmly, no evidence of the dagger within his smile.

However, Xu Que took a glance at the sky and casually replied, “No need. Actually, my purpose today was only to warn you all not to insist upon my daughter-in-law. Your response has been cordial enough. I’m not ruthless. You don’t owe me anything. In fact, I have important matters to deal with and have to leave the Heaven Continent for quite some time. Don’t do anything stupid!”

As he finished speaking, Xu Que stood up and waved for Buttface, Duan Jiude, and the others to leave.

Their sudden departure was not because Xu Que had any feeling of danger. It was simply because time was running out. And truly, all they had really wanted to do was to shake things up with the Sage Sect. There’d been no intention of having a real battle.

After all, Xu Que wanted to keep living. He only had ten or so days left, and he must journey to the Four Great Continents. As for the Sage Sect, there would be time enough upon their return to handle them.

Elder Lee was left completely bewildered by their actions.

He stood stunned, almost to the point of spitting out blood.

“I finally convinced the Sect Leader to open the door. We were going to wake the ancestors in order to defeat you. And now, you’re saying that you’re going to leave?

“D*mn, don’t even think about it!

“The door is open. Today, no one can even think about leaving!”
